notes: Although there's now a native version for linux, there wasn't when I first tested this game about 5 months ago. I'm writing this report because my old one, (blank screen, no sound etc) no longer applies - not only does the native version work well, but all five currently available proton versions (3.7-8, 3.7-8 beta, 3.16-4, 3.16-8 beta, 4.2-1) run the windows version perfectly too.
title: Necrosphere
